# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [18.x, 20.x]
        python-version: [3.9, 3.10]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Setup Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v4
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}
        cache: 'npm'
        cache-dependency-path: '**/package-lock.json'

    - name: Setup Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}
        cache: 'pip'

    - name: Cache node_modules
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-node-modules
      with:
        path: |
          **/node_modules
          !**/node_modules/**/node_modules
        key: node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.node-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.node-version }}-
          node-modules-${{ runner.os }}-

    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-pip
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements*.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          pip-${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.python-version }}-
          pip-${{ runner.os }}-

    - name: Cache configuration files
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      id: cache-configs
      with:
        path: |
          .env
          .env.local
          config/**
          src/config/**
        key: configs-${{ runner.os }}-${{ github.sha }}
        restore-keys: |
          configs-${{ runner.os }}-

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        if [ -f "package-lock.json" ]; then
          npm ci
        else
          npm install
        fi
        if [ -f "requirements.txt" ]; then
          pip install -r requirements.txt
        fi

    - name: Run tests
      run: |
        npm test
        # Add your test commands here

    - name: Build project
      run: |
        npm run build
        # Add your build commands here

    - name: Upload build artifacts
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: build-${{ github.sha }}
        path: |
          dist/**
          build/**
        retention-days: 7
